title: Ghastlings Forever
body:
Ghastling Forever lets Ghastlings (Baby Happy Ghasts) remain babies forever.

By default, ghastlings will stay babies forever, allowing you to interact with them without worrying about them growing up into Happy Ghasts.

- Snowballs can be fed freely with no consequences.
 
![A snowball on top of a Mangrove Log](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb155a3ea69fc2836ceb110a1fe07c050df712d2.png)
- A Snow Block is required to unlock growth.

![A Snow Block on top of a Mangrove Log](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fa38feddae3157a61fc591e3c2b35e393b7c721.png)

- Once unlocked, the ghastling can grow into a full Happy Ghast normally.

This mod gives players full control over when (and if) their ghastlings grow!

I've no plans on porting this to specific versions for myself or making it work with the Ghastlings Backport, but if you'd want any version in specific let me know in my Discord and I'll see what I can do for you.
